name: Bill Weld
subject: 90 and 98
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu_cJMQYkRJwJI2rEB5WCb-E&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191105_fr_p&n=1) Hey, We’re only 90 days away from the Iowa caucuses and 98 days away from the New Hampshire primary. I’m going to put this as bluntly as possible — **we need to have a strong showing in Iowa and New Hampshire if we’re going to win this thing.** That means we’ve got to start making heavy investments online and in the field if we’re going to make Donald Trump a one-term president. Right now we’re running online ads asking folks to stand up, speak out, and join us in our movement to reclaim America. There are millions of Americans who are desperate for the strong, fiscally conservative leadership we can bring to Washington — **but unless we reach them with our ads, we run the risk of coming up short at a critical time for our campaign.** [**So can you give us a hand and boost our ads, so that folks in Iowa, New Hampshire, and across the country can see them?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu_cJMQYkRJwJI2rEB5WCb-E&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191105_fr_p&n=2) **[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu_cJMQYkRJwJI2rEB5WCb-E&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191105_fr_p&n=3)** Thanks, Bill | | [HELP TEAM WELD ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu_cJMQYkRJwJI2rEB5WCb-E&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191105_fr_p&n=4)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: not asking you for money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
I need 50,000 signatures strong if you agree underprivileged kids in this country shouldn't be more likely to go to prison than graduate. >> | | |
---
| |
---
| | **Where I grew up, if you fell behind or messed up, you were more likely to end up in prison than in college.**[**_That 's why I just met with inmates at a DC jail to discuss solutions with them, directly. And why I'm asking you to add your name in support of my transformative criminal justice plan. I need 50,000 signatures before midnight. >>_**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc802/3eb3e2fc/56062676/744d8835/1242881093/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/criminal-justice-plan-survey?source=20191105_em_pet_b2_castro_all") I grew up in a neighborhood without much privilege. Our public schools were severely under-resourced -- only a few of us made it to college. And if we messed up even once, we were more likely to end up in prison before walking across the graduation stage. **The truth is, people like me are rarely given a first chance to succeed -- much less a second.** [**_That 's why I just released my First Chance criminal justice plan to TRANSFORM our broken system into one that gives folks a real chance from the start. I hope you'll take a second to read about it -- then sign your name if you support it. I need 50,000 signatures before midnight. >>_**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc802/3eb3e2fc/56062676/744d8835/1242881093/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/criminal-justice-plan-survey?source=20191105_em_pet_b2_castro_all") Let me be clear: I won't stand for a criminal justice system that punishes people for being poor and underprivileged. I know the best way to reduce the number of people in our jails -- is to prevent them from entering the system to begin with. **That starts with giving folks a real First Chance to succeed from the start.** [**_I 'm asking you to add your name next to mine before midnight if you have my back on this. I need 50,000 signatures strong if you agree underprivileged kids in this country shouldn't be more likely to go to prison than graduate. >>_**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc802/3eb3e2fc/56062676/744d8835/1242881093/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/criminal-justice-plan-survey?source=20191105_em_pet_b2_castro_all") Thank you, Julian

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc802/3eb3e2fc/56062676/744d8831/1242881093/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc802/3eb3e2fc/56062676/744d8830/1242881093/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc802/3eb3e2fc/56062676/744d883f/1242881093/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH: Someone in Washington is keeping his promises
body:
Lost in House Democrats’—and the media’s—obsession with trying to win the pointless Beltway news cycle is this: | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=15bfb94b2a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • November 5, 2019
---
| | |
# **WATCH: Someone in Washington is keeping his promises**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=314b640a9d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Lost in House Democrats’** —and the media’s—obsession with trying to “win” the pointless Beltway news cycle is this: There are _actual, real problems_ that the American people want Washington to help fix. And today, only one party is even trying to fix them.

**The left’s rage** hasn’t deterred President Donald J. Trump one bit. Less than 3 years after Election Day 2016, his record on the policies that matter most speaks for itself:
* The United States Military is stronger than it’s ever been.

* America’s unemployment rate today is near a _half-century_ low.

* Medicare is being protected for seniors, not robbed to pay everyone else.

* ISIS’ territorial caliphate is decimated, and its horrible, violent leader is dead.

* Historic criminal justice reform is giving more citizens a second chance.

* Our troops are coming home, not fighting endless wars around the world.

**That’s just** **the short list.** And no matter how hard Democrats and their media allies fight to remake America into a socialist, open-borders nightmare, President Trump and conservatives will fight ten times harder to protect the American way of life for all of us.
---
|
---
|
## **NEW: Drug prices fall at fastest rate in 50 years**

**Here’s yet another** story you won’t see in the headlines: Under President Trump, prescription drug prices are decreasing at rates not seen since the 1960s.

**The reason** the media ignores this success is that it contradicts the left’s economic narrative. In their view, American healthcare was broken until Obamacare fixed it. (Of course, the fact that Democrat-Socialists are now calling for a “Medicare for All” takeover of healthcare reveals that their own policies have failed, but never mind that.) Any problems with healthcare today are solely because of President Trump, they claim.

**The stats don’t lie**. In the eight years before President Trump’s inauguration, prescription drug prices increased by a stunning average of 3.6 percent _per year_. Fast forward to today, and prescription medicine prices have seen year-over-year _declines_ in 9 of the past 10 months, with a 1.1 percent drop as of the most recent month available.

**This past June** , in fact, the United States saw its largest single-year drop—a 2 percent year-over-year decline—in prescription drug prices since 1967.

**That’s no coincidence.** Through crucial reforms that most of the media ignored, the Trump Administration has continued to push through generic drug approvals at a record pace. When these drugs enter the market, they boost competition across the board, bringing the direct-to-patient costs down for everyone along with them.

**American patients first** —that was President Trump’s most important healthcare promise, and he meant it. Because of that, even without Congress’ help, America is better off today than it has been in a long time.

[Prescription drug prices are falling at historic levels. Here is the real story.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=75b59f6c3d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
| **President Trump, joined by Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell, R-KY, departs Air Force one in Lexington, Kentucky** | November 4, 2019
---
|

---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=2715%2E377263%2EcX4_9V) Yang Gang --

The thresholds for the December debate were announced a couple of weeks ago. And as of today, _we haven’t qualified._

We still need three more qualifying polls to get to the debate stage -- and the way we rise in the polls is by investing in a strong field operation and coordinated ad campaigns. **[Can you pitch in $10?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16028?t=5&akid=2715%2E377263%2EcX4_9V)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16028?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=2715%2E377263%2EcX4_9V)

body:

[**Please take a moment to read a message Michael sent you earlier - it's attached below. We're facing candidates that are pumping millions of dollars into their campaign, and we need your help to stay competitive! Can Michael count on you, team?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae72/134673f2/a570f2e/6997cfa0/2513386203/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_110519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
| | [CHIP IN NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae72/134673f2/a570f2e/6997cfa0/2513386203/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_110519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Friend: In a moment, [I'm going to ask you to make a $29 donation to my campaign, but first let me tell you why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae72/134673f2/a570f2e/6997cfa7/2513386203/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110519_AC_CO&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Tom Steyer propped his campaign up with $47.6 MILLION of his own money, and Donald Trump raised $3 MILLION in a single day.

I crunched the numbers with my finance team, and if we're going to stay competitive in this billionaires race, we're going to need your help.

Since I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step I take in this journey is because grassroots supporters like you are with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

[We're launching ads, opening new offices, and hiring field staff, but we need to keep building at a fast pace if we're going to fuel this campaign to victory!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae72/134673f2/a570f2e/6997cfa6/2513386203/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110519_AC_CO&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[That's where you come in. The average online donation to my campaign is $29, but any amount you donate today will help fuel this fight. Can I count on you? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae72/134673f2/a570f2e/6997cfa7/2513386203/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110519_AC_CO&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Cory Booker
subject: The next debate is around the corner -- what are your plans?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, The November debate in Atlanta is less than three weeks away, and I'm already starting to prepare. I'm excited to bring our shared vision of a more just America that leaves nobody behind to a national audience. I want to make sure we reach every corner of the country, and I would like your help to do just that. **[Can you host a debate watch party in Cresco on November 20th?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/host-debate-watch-party?source=em_su_20191105_CB_20191105-su-CB-debatehost-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Hosting a debate watch party is a great way to elevate your support and meet local members of Team Cory in your neighborhood. And don't worry! Our team will give you everything you need to succeed -- you'll be invited to join planning calls and have the opportunity to join our exclusive online community. **[Click here to sign up to host a debate watch party.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/host-debate-watch-party?source=em_su_20191105_CB_20191105-su-CB-debatehost-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/host-debate-watch-party?source=em_su_20191105_CB_20191105-su-CB-debatehost-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0abe/5fca0d19/764e910f/291c1636/931240846/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0abe/5fca0d19/764e910f/291c1635/931240846/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0abe/5fca0d19/764e910f/291c1634/931240846/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0abe/5fca0d19/764e910f/291c1633/931240846/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Thank you, Kentucky!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
Thank you, Kentucky! This was a HUGE win for our teachers, first responders, social workers and every family whose bills keep going up while wages stay the same.
|
---

| | Peter,

Thank you, Kentucky! This was a HUGE win for our teachers, first responders, social workers and every family whose bills keep going up while wages stay the same.

I will be a governor who listens more than I talk and solves more problems than I create.

I ran on kitchen table issues: pensions, health care, public education and creating good-paying jobs. That is how I will govern.

**Thank you again to everyone who contributed, knocked on doors, made phone calls, and sent texts. This is your victory.**

We are going to treat everyone with dignity and respect. And the doors to your state capitol will always be open.

Thanks for everything,
Andy Beshear | | **[DONATE](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557976/ad6dc73/17b35a47/db7077a/1365176812/VEsH/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-win?refcode=20191105.3db&amount=25")**

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Voter protection leads to victory!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
Democrats won key victories -- with Fair Fight's support to protect the vote! |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa559/34a064cc/1b318762/70374d9/1323302070/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Voter protection leads to victory. This summer, I announced that Fair Fight 2020 would make early investments in voter protection--not based on which states Democrats won in the past, but based on where we could lend a hand to protect and turn out the vote. **Tonight proved that our strategy works.** Today, voters turned out in droves for Democrats up and down the ballot. In key states, Fair Fight helped launch voter protection programs and hotlines. The results speak for themselves: In Kentucky, **turnout was up 50 percent** and voters elected Democrat Andy Beshear as Governor. In Virginia, Democrats **flipped** the State Senate and the House of Delegates. And at home in Georgia, Fair Fight-backed candidates won in municipal races **across the state**. Now is the time to double down on voter protection. 2020 turnout will be higher than ever--but voter suppression efforts will be even more intense--and we need to make sure voter protection programs are in place across the country, early. We must ensure every vote is counted and every voice is heard. **Can you chip in today to help Fair Fight build strong voter protection programs in states across the country so we can build on this success and win in 2020?** [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa559/34a064cc/1b318762/70374e0/1323302070/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/-/Donate Buttons/chip in now-01.png") Let's get it done. \--Stacey
---

body:

[Click here](https://email.transformationmarketing.com/t/r-e-jdtizdy-uktunkib-k/) [](https://email.transformationmarketing.com/t/r-l-jdtizdy-uktunkib-r/) **Please help Matt and the Innis Team hand out rosters before the Nebraska vs Wisconsin home football game on November 16th!****SIGN UP TODAY!** [Yes! I Want to Volunteer - Sign Me Up!](https://email.transformationmarketing.com/t/r-l-jdtizdy-uktunkib-y/) Thank you for your support so far, and keep talking to your friends and family about the campaign. name: Team Chabot
subject: ICYMI: The Clinton Impeachment Was Fair
body:
Today's Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme. Just when we thought they couldn't get further to the left, today's Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide. No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jddkdlo-kujkulhluu-i/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddkdlo-kujkulhluu-r/) **In Case You Missed It** _The Clinton Impeachment Was Fair_ By Jim Sensenbrenner and Steve ChabotNovember 3, 2019Tensions ran high 20 years ago as we stood in the well of the Senate before Chief Justice William Rehnquist, all 100 senators and the nation. As House impeachment managers, we presented our case against President Clinton. We were somber but confident, knowing that we had afforded Mr. Clinton every due-process right to defend himself.Now we find ourselves on the verge of another presidential impeachment. But this time the process is so fundamentally unfair that justice cannot be served. For the past two months, House Democrats, led by Intelligence Committee Chairman Adam Schiff, have conducted a sham investigation with predetermined conclusions. It will do unthinkable damage to the credibility of the House and to the nation.Since President Trump took the oath of office, Mr. Schiff has led a quest to overturn the 2016 election. We have both worked with Mr. Schiff on the Judiciary Committee, and one of us (Mr. Sensenbrenner) has managed two judicial impeachments (of Samuel B. Kent and G. Thomas Porteous Jr. ) alongside him. While in those cases he was fair and reasonable, here he has let his blind hatred of the president poison his conduct and destroy his credibility.For more than two years, Mr. Schiff misled the public about having clear evidence that Mr. Trump colluded with the Russians to steal the election. Special counsel Robert Mueller found no such evidence. Mr. Schiff then set his eyes on the next "scandal." A seemingly too-good-to-be-true report appeared, accusing the president of improper action. Mr. Schiff took to cable news to propagate the new narrative, but it soon began to crumble. We learned that the biased "whistleblower" had contacted Mr. Schiff's committee before filing his report, and Mr. Schiff lied about it.Nevertheless, Speaker Nancy Pelosi decreed the House to have begun an impeachment inquiry and Mr. Schiff launched three weeks of closed-door hearings. He played judge and jury, selectively leaking private testimony to fuel a smear campaign. In blatant disregard of congressional practice, he has prevented elected members from asking certain questions of his "star witnesses."The American people saw through this charade, and Mrs. Pelosi brought the rules for this process up for a vote last week. But it's too little and too late....Americans should be concerned about the denial of fundamental constitutional rights to the president of the United States. If it can happen to him, whom can't it happen to?From day one, the Democrats have had their sights set on impeachment and have charted a process that could only lead to that end. By denying due process to this president, Democrats have delegitimized the House and its constitutional powers, and have done irreparable damage to the country. _[Read more from the Wall Street Journal here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddkdlo-kujkulhluu-y/)_ | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddkdlo-kujkulhluu-j/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddkdlo-kujkulhluu-t/)
---|---
PO Box 54461 Cincinnati, OH 45254

name: Lerah Lee for Congress
subject: AOC is a Communist Sympathizer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lerah Lee for Congress
body:
AOC is calling the Electoral College a "Racist Scam." She needs to be taught a lesson... _We'd hate to see you go but if you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](../"http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWDvxggwGN")****_

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53390627:WDvxggwGN:m:1:2184552809:662E623E51AA0C922F260CE7F9205405:r)
---
Friend,

In case you need a reminder or haven't received correspondence from me until today - My name is Dr. Lerah Lee. I'm a black conservative Republican, educator, mother of five, and candidate for Congress in Georgia's 7th Congressional District.

Recently, I came across an article from Fox News - which you've probably heard about by now - in which **Marxist member of Congress Alexandria Ocasio Cortez** - advocates for the abolition of the Electoral College, calling it a "Racist Scam."

| [ ☆ Protect the Electoral College ☆
**DONATE NOW »**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53390627:WDvxggwGN:m:1:2184552809:662E623E51AA0C922F260CE7F9205405:r)
---

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53390627:WDvxggwGN:m:1:2184552809:662E623E51AA0C922F260CE7F9205405:r)
Well, all I have to say is - **that ain't gonna fly**. Also, I don't think she paid much attention in civics class ...

What the Electoral College _**_actually_**_ does is ensure political decision making isn't concentrated with coastal elites, like AOC herself. **_We should not abolish a system - used effectively for more than 200 years --just because it didn't provide the expected outcome for one particular party at one moment in history_**.

As a professional educator - I know my civics, and I promise that If I get to Congress, **I'll make sure AOC knows everything there is to know about the Electoral College**.

[ ☆ Teach AOC a civics lesson ☆
**DONATE NOW »**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53390627:WDvxggwGN:m:1:2184552809:662E623E51AA0C922F260CE7F9205405:r)
---

**As an educated black woman** (**who also happens to be a conservative Republican**), I understand the pain of my ancestors who were counted in the census yet denied the right to vote; but historical injustices shouldn't be used as pretense to sow even more division at present.

**Comrade AOC** needs to be challenged on the merits of her very dangerous ideas - ideally by a conservative of color; but therein lies the problem: **there is not a single female Republican of color in the U.S. House**.

[ ☆ Send a black Republican to Congress ☆
**DONATE NOW »**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53390627:WDvxggwGN:m:1:2184552809:662E623E51AA0C922F260CE7F9205405:r)
---

**[You can help me change that.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53390627:WDvxggwGN:m:1:2184552809:662E623E51AA0C922F260CE7F9205405:r)** I'm not afraid to call AOC out for the fraud that she is - and I'll make it my mission to ensure her message of hate is drowned out. But first, I need to make it through a crowded primary field, and that's where you come in. **[Can you chip in $25, $50, or even $150 today so I can continue to share my strong, optimistic conservative message to Georgia voters?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53390627:WDvxggwGN:m:1:2184552809:662E623E51AA0C922F260CE7F9205405:r)**

I promise you that if I am elected to the House, my first act as a member of Congress will be to challenge AOC to a very public debate - and I guarantee you that you'll enjoy watching that more than you did the finale of "Cheers".

Time is of the essence, Friend - if **[I'm not able to raise $150,000 by the end of November, I won't qualify for my race's primary debates.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53390627:WDvxggwGN:m:1:2184552809:662E623E51AA0C922F260CE7F9205405:r)**

By making a contribution today, you'll be helping to ensure I can hire a campaign team and let the establishment folks know that I'm not playing with them, don't have time for them, that I fear God and if they don't that's on them.

Blessings always,
Lerah Lee, Ph.D

[ ☆ SUPPORT LERAH LEE ☆
**DONATE NOW »**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53390627:WDvxggwGN:m:1:2184552809:662E623E51AA0C922F260CE7F9205405:r)
---

subject: Help welcome President Trump🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
I’ll personally match your support... and I’ll add your name to the list I’ll be sharing with the President before kickoff.

| | | | | | | | [](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=b50b978a7704b97d404de95cb73c092ae8de30683b0840f1047b1afbb9ff9c11434645519d78c3a1cde8c95f306b3d7e9fdd5f7bf34ba418)

| | | Peter,

Did you see this big news?

**President Trump is headed to our great state this weekend, to attend the Saturday showdown between LSU and Alabama.**

I want to make sure the President knows that Alabama has his back.

That's why I'm matching every contribution as we lead up to the game this week... and I'm going to share a list with him of all those stepping up to help, right before kickoff.

**[Peter, can you chip in $5, $10, $20, or $50 (or more) today? Click here to donate.](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=b50b978a7704b97d63ebe17df91236f81094083a39d349ebb003939211a3a3710e7e4e52cb31b379b8230c86014790ed7598f6bacd4c623b)**

No matter how much you donate, I'll match it dollar-for-dollar and I'll add your name to the list of supporters to President Trump.

Let's give President Trump the warm welcome he deserves. We can show the entire nation that Alabama sees right through the socialist Democrats' desperate and dishonest attacks, and stands with this great man as he fights the good fight to Make America GREAT Again!

**_[Contribute today, and this Saturday I'll let the President know that you have his back](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=b50b978a7704b97d18723ef407889d6f585869becb20a0d9ba53b166b8e9f369f20306e44199eafb1fcf0fbaab051b6cb6aed98702628bdd "Contribute today, and this Saturday I’ll let the President know that you have his back")._******

name: Kim Mangone
subject: Wanted to introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Committee to Elect Kim Mangone for Congress
body:
|
---

| | _Hi Peter,_ _I’m Kim Mangone. I’m an Air Force veteran, a systems engineer, and the woman who is going to beat Kevin McCarthy. I know the issues my neighbors are facing because, as a single working mom, I lived them, and, as an organizer in my community, I help people face them. Our current representative, Kevin McCarthy, is more focused on protecting the president from accountability than he is on the needs of his constituents. We’ve tried for too long to change his mind. Now it’s time to vote him out. If you’d rather not hear about our plans to beat Kevin McCarthy and give CA-23 the leadership it deserves, you can click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/7f4bb3e9-9feb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68/c9f8d62f-ad00-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWY4ZDYyZi1hZDAwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uZNtwBfPlx1COpYzNC4IAPDecKsa47ABnAIbzq3Xd6Q=&id=114555583&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)._
* * *
I’ve lived in this community for 30 years, and I love it here. We’re diverse, welcoming, and take care of each other. But there are some real issues here, too. Our unemployment rate is 8.4%, more than twice as high as the state-wide average. Rising costs of living have priced some neighbors out of the community and forced others out onto the streets. And climate change is an existential threat to our region. Despite all of this, Kevin McCarthy spends all his time in Washington running cover for the president. He has even locked his constituents out of his office when they come to meet him. That is unacceptable. I’m running because I love my community, I love the people in it, and I want to do everything I can to help them. This is the best chance to unseat McCarthy in his whole career. I have the right experience, background, and skills to do it. I’m reaching out today to see what you have to say about my opponent: **Do you support Kevin McCarthy?** | **[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11591516/118203921/-501333345?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWY4ZDYyZi1hZDAwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uZNtwBfPlx1COpYzNC4IAPDecKsa47ABnAIbzq3Xd6Q=&emci=7f4bb3e9-9feb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=c9f8d62f-ad00-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10431999 "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Gf-VWSsi2A")** | | **[NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11591517/118203922/-501333345?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWY4ZDYyZi1hZDAwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uZNtwBfPlx1COpYzNC4IAPDecKsa47ABnAIbzq3Xd6Q=&emci=7f4bb3e9-9feb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=c9f8d62f-ad00-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10431999 "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Gf-VWSsi2A")**
---|---|---

Thanks,
Kim

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Peter, last week I heard from a woman in Hubbard. Now I want to hear from you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

One of the most rewarding parts of running for office is meeting with voters and learning about the issues that matter most to them.

Last week, I met a woman in Hubbard who paid nearly $200 for an inhaler, a potentially life-saving prescription. Her doctor told her that she could cross the border to Canada if she wanted to find a more affordable inhaler.

In Lehigh, I heard about over 96 days of flooding that could wipe out the town of 401 people — right now the river is 2 1⁄2 feet higher than normal.

In Ellsworth, a town of 500 people, I spoke with voters about broadband access, rural hospitals, and fighting against the power of special interests in our politics.

As I’ve been driving in the Sioux City Sue to hear directly from folks about the issues that matter to them, the number one thing folks tell me is they don’t feel represented in Washington anymore.

**_[Peter, I’m running for Congress to be your voice, so I’d like to learn more about the challenges facing you and your family. Please take a moment to take our 2020 issues survey today so I can hear what’s on your mind.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11595404/118230173/-445011204?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDdmMGVlOC1iNjAwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5-U5YKxWiz2IbrzC0xiXJZh7Jio9CKqWb1dHmIiDEG8=&emci=0f4eacca-d5ff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=147f0ee8-b600-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013&ms=em19_191107_issuessurv_jd_l1&refcode=em19_191107_issuessurv_jd_l1)_** **[TAKE THE 2020 ISSUES SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11595405/118230179/-445011204?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDdmMGVlOC1iNjAwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5-U5YKxWiz2IbrzC0xiXJZh7Jio9CKqWb1dHmIiDEG8=&emci=0f4eacca-d5ff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=147f0ee8-b600-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013&ms=em19_191107_issuessurv_jd_b1&refcode=em19_191107_issuessurv_jd_b1)** The people I’ve spoken with on our Don’t Forget About Us tour are some of the most resilient, hard-working, and kind folks I’ve ever met.

They give their all to help their families and communities, and they deserve to feel represented by a member of Congress who will fight for what matters to them.

From trade deals and abuses of the Renewable Fuel Standard to improving infrastructure, I promise to always listen and fight for everyday people, not special interests.

**_[That includes you, because in this people-powered campaign, your voice matters. Please take this important survey today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11595406/118230184/-445011204?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDdmMGVlOC1iNjAwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5-U5YKxWiz2IbrzC0xiXJZh7Jio9CKqWb1dHmIiDEG8=&emci=0f4eacca-d5ff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=147f0ee8-b600-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013&ms=em19_191107_issuessurv_jd_l2&refcode=em19_191107_issuessurv_jd_l2)_** **[TAKE THE 2020 ISSUES SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11595407/118230187/-445011204?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDdmMGVlOC1iNjAwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5-U5YKxWiz2IbrzC0xiXJZh7Jio9CKqWb1dHmIiDEG8=&emci=0f4eacca-d5ff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=147f0ee8-b600-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013&ms=em19_191107_issuessurv_jd_b2&refcode=em19_191107_issuessurv_jd_b2)** Thank you,

J.D. Scholten [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11595408/118230188/-1319866263?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDdmMGVlOC1iNjAwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5-U5YKxWiz2IbrzC0xiXJZh7Jio9CKqWb1dHmIiDEG8=&refcode=em19_191107_issuessurv_jd_button)

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Have questions, concerns, or ideas? Simply reply to this email — we love hearing from supporters! You can also connect with the campaign on social media: Like us on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11595409/118230189/-579313244?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDdmMGVlOC1iNjAwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5-U5YKxWiz2IbrzC0xiXJZh7Jio9CKqWb1dHmIiDEG8=&emci=0f4eacca-d5ff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=147f0ee8-b600-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013) or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11595410/118230190/-1912497674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDdmMGVlOC1iNjAwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5-U5YKxWiz2IbrzC0xiXJZh7Jio9CKqWb1dHmIiDEG8=&emci=0f4eacca-d5ff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=147f0ee8-b600-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013). Email is one of the most important ways we stay in touch with supporters like you, so we'd hate to see you go; but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/0f4eacca-d5ff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68/147f0ee8-b600-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDdmMGVlOC1iNjAwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5-U5YKxWiz2IbrzC0xiXJZh7Jio9CKqWb1dHmIiDEG8=&id=109918160&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) from Scholten4Iowa emails.

subject: Report: PA’s Scott Perry among Congress’s most vulnerable incumbents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11597254/118247691/480453248?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2E4YmY1NC1iYTAwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQIrAiHG4El_4eKmNgTm0_vyUvmmCG_kpGWZd6H9CrE=&refcode=em_fr_2019.11.06_b1_te_all&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800) Team,

**A new report from Roll Call out this week lists Scott Perry as one of the top 10 most vulnerable members of Congress in 2020.**

This comes after the _Washington Post_ listed our race as one of the top 10 races in the country, the _National Journal_ listed Scott Perry as one of the top 10 most endangered incumbents, and the nonpartisan election forecasters at the _Cook Political Report_ rated PA-10 a toss-up district.

Long story short: **This race is guaranteed to come down to the wire.**

The _Roll Call_ report goes on to say: _“ [Another] Republican on the list is Pennsylvania’s Scott Perry, who’s facing a top Democratic recruit in a district that’s now less favorable to his party. He faces state auditor Eugene DePasquale, who narrowly carried [PA-10] in his auditor race in 2016 and got off to a fast fundraising start...”_ **[Team, can you chip in $10, $15, or $20 to help Eugene keep this momentum rolling? clean_body: Team, A new report from Roll Call out this week lists Scott Perry as one of the top 10 most vulnerable members of Congress in 2020. This comes after the Washington Post listed our race as one of the top 10 races in the country, the National Journal listed Scott Perry as one of the top 10 most endangered incumbents, and the nonpartisan election forecasters at the Cook Political Report rated PA-10 a toss-up district. Long story short: This race is guaranteed to come down to the wire. The Roll Call report goes on to say: “ [Another] Republican on the list is Pennsylvania’s Scott Perry, who’s facing a top Democratic recruit in a district that’s now less favorable to his party. He faces state auditor Eugene DePasquale, who narrowly carried [PA-10] in his auditor race in 2016 and got off to a fast fundraising start...” | | ---|--- | | Thanks for your continued support, Eugene Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: Eugene DePasquale is running to represent Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District. body:

Peter,
They lied to you.
**1,556 more families were separated at the border than the Trump administration previously reported. That’s now a total of at least 4,300 families senselessly ripped apart.** Some of them still haven’t been reunited, and some of them may never be. Enough is enough. It’s time for us to fight back.
[_**Dan Crenshaw does not represent our Texas values. Donate $25 to help us unseat him in 2020.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11599671/118268950/1785235803?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjk0NWZiYi1jNzAwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wesevQu76zppHNBIZgr_tmnroA3e36T90DEyPt_zLMk=&refcode=1106border&amount=25recurring=1)
Family separation is a human rights abuse - period. This inhumane policy was enacted in our name, with our hard-earned tax dollars, Peter. Instead of accepting our tired, poor, and huddled masses yearning to breathe free, **Republicans, like Dan Crenshaw, are spewing fear and hate - this must stop.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11599672/118268956/1785235803?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjk0NWZiYi1jNzAwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wesevQu76zppHNBIZgr_tmnroA3e36T90DEyPt_zLMk=&refcode=1106pic&amount=25recurring=1)
This is a culture that comes from the very top and starts with an administration that dehumanizes people to further their agenda. This policy is a slap in the face to our Texas values.
As your next Representative, I will fight for our values. I will never back down from what is right.

Elisa Cardnell

| | **Friends-
**
How much does it cost to buy Max Rose’s vote?

We found out last week: $2,000.

That’s how much Congressman Adam Schiff donated to Max Rose before beginning his impeachment witch hunt, which Max Rose formally voted to support last week. $2,000 and Max Rose supported impeachment - Schiff, Pelosi, and the liberals in DC are getting a great price!

Max Rose might have taken millions in campaign cash - yes, millions - from special interests outside the district, but nothing is more egregious than accepting $2,000 from Adam Schiff and then voting to support impeachment. It’s akin to a prosecutor giving money to a grand juror prior to a trial.

I know we’re going to beat Max Rose next November, but between now and then he is still our Congressman and know what, he needs to give that money back to Adam Schiff.

We’re going to run ads, we’re going to send mail, we’re going to get on the phones, we aren’t going to stop until Max Rose returns the donation.

Are you going to let Max Rose get away with this? No way, I know you won’t.

[So join me right now, add your name and chip in to fund our ads and outreach to put the pressure on Max Rose: give shifty Schiff his $2,000 back.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=20A23A1A191)

Sincerely,
Nicole

name: Corky Messner
subject: 🇺🇸 RSVP: Upcoming Veterans Events 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8e2078842f272fb7/ecdf84786bfbd688c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter,

From a young age, I felt the calling to serve our nation. I am proud to have attended and graduated from West Point, and to have served as an Army Ranger during the Cold War.

I am also the proud father of two current West Point cadets.

I’m running to once again serve our nation... and to stand up and speak out for America’s active duty military and veterans in the U.S. Senate.

**Today, we are letting our veterans down. And it is absolutely unacceptable.**

**[Tap or click here to watch a video I’ve recorded](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8e2078842f272fb7/18449fc971de0bd6c3d6b838967d376c/33153 "Click here to watch. ")**. We’re launching a sustained campaign leading up to Veterans Day 2019, to highlight how our federal government is falling short, and what we must do to fulfill our responsibility to our veterans. [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8e2078842f272fb7/8d605c482dfa3f43c3d6b838967d376c/33153) We all know by now how gross mismanagement of the VA has been a DISASTER for our nation’s veterans.

We need reform our VA healthcare system, so that our veterans get the quality care they deserve and require in a timely manner. Enough is enough of this systemic failure.

Our New Hampshire veterans SHOULD NOT have to make a long drive out-of-state to receive care. They should be able to see quality specialists right here in the Granite State.

**My campaign is also launching two big veterans events that I want to personally invite you to attend. See below for the details.** | |
---
**Cigars with Vets at Federal Cigar in Portsmouth
**
DATE: Saturday, November 9th
TIME: 5:00PM
LOCATION: Federal Cigar, Portsmouth
ADDRESS: Corner of Ladd & Market St. Portsmouth, NH 03801
RSVP: [https://messner-cigars-with-vets.eventbrite.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8e2078842f272fb7/61c6c4b7548e6072c3d6b838967d376c/33153 "Click here to RSVP")
|
---
**Corky Messner Veterans Appreciation Pancake Breakfast**

DATE: Monday November 11th - Veterans Day
TIME: 8:00AM - 10:00AM
LOCATION: American Legion Jutras Post 43 Manchester NH
ADDRESS: 56 Boutwell St, Manchester, NH 03102
RSVP: [https://messner-veterans-pancake-breakfast.eventbrite.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8e2078842f272fb7/e267f8d50d437ec9c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|
---
I’m proud to have defended liberty by guarding the Iron Curtain. And I’m proud of every single man and woman who has responded to the call to serve our nation.

**[Please join us for Veterans Day](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8e2078842f272fb7/5b43aea11e5391c3c3d6b838967d376c/33153 "Click here to learn more.")**. It will be my honor and privilege to see you there honoring our veterans.

\- Corky

name: Team Turner
subject: No more Schiff! No more impeachment!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDEwNTE0MDMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTY0MDUwMzA4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Last week, Nancy Pelosi put forth the first procedural vote on impeachment proceedings. Adam Schiff's closed door investigations have now received validation.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDEwNTE0MDMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDUwMzA4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=NDEwNTE0MDMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDUwMzA4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,
Last week, Nancy Pelosi put forth the first procedural vote on impeachment proceedings. Adam Schiff's closed door investigations have now received validation. [_**We cannot allow Schiff to continue spinning a fabricated impeachment web!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=NDEwNTE0MDMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDUwMzA4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) The American people deserve to see what Schiff is hiding behind his closed door proceedings.
We can't allow Schiff to continue this politically motivated investigation into the President. [_**We must hold him accountable!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDEwNTE0MDMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDUwMzA4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
There are so many issues that Congress needs to focus on: ending the opioid epidemic devastating our Ohio communities, addressing healthcare needs, and so many others. Yet Schiff and Nancy Pelosi refuse to address these critical issues and instead embark on a divisive, partisan impeachment investigation.
[_**Will you stand with us here at Team Turner? Let us know if you oppose Schiff and oppose further closed door proceedings!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=NDEwNTE0MDMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDUwMzA4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[_**Sign our petition today!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=NDEwNTE0MDMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDUwMzA4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[_**Say NO to Schiff!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDEwNTE0MDMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDUwMzA4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Team Turner
PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
---

name: Lipinski Campaign HQ
subject: If we’re being honest...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,

We’re officially one year out from Election Day 2020!

If we’re being honest, that’s not a lot of time.

We don’t have to tell you how high the stakes are for us next year. Our campaign is facing attacks from extremists on both sides of the political spectrum — and we need the resources to keep responding with our positive message.

Can you chip in right now to help make sure we have what it takes to fend off these attacks? We need to put $6,000 in the bank by midnight tomorrow. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-nov-1yearout-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191106_1_1&amount=15&recurring=true]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below.

Donate $15 now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-nov-1yearout-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191106_1_1&amount=15&express_lane=true]

Donate $25 now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-nov-1yearout-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191106_1_1&amount=25&express_lane=true]

Donate $50 now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-nov-1yearout-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191106_1_1&amount=50&express_lane=true]

Donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-nov-1yearout-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191106_1_1&amount=15&recurring=true]

Dan’s been working hard in Congress to represent the people of IL-03 and to take a pragmatic and commonsense approach for Illinoisans. But now, we’re less than 4 months away from the primary election, and only one year away from the general election.

Can we count on you to make a contribution now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-nov-1yearout-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191106_1_1&amount=15&recurring=true]Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-nov-1yearout-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191106_1_1&amount=15&recurring=true]

Thanks for your support,
Lipinski HQ

Dan, an engineer and former teacher, has brought hundreds of millions of dollars in critical infrastructure projects to Illinois, fought for better schools, protections for our seniors, reforms to fix our broken Congress, and sought to make healthcare more affordable for all. We are grateful for your support. Please take a moment to like Dan on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/danlipinskiforcongress/] or follow Dan on Twitter [https://twitter.com/DanLipinski] . If you’d like to contribute to help Dan keep fighting in Congress, you can click here to support Dan’s reelection now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-general?refcode=footer&amount=20&recurring=auto]

PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS

Click here to unsubscribe from Dan's email list. [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f17721a4-b400-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68/0eb7dc56-d600-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWI3ZGM1Ni1kNjAwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-oJgi7Jj3NSBVOsgmh6F9uzi8dx5RaTmXaDyUimTBLo=&id=103593688&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com]

Dan Lipinski for Congress
P.O. Box 520
Western Springs, IL 60558

name: Team Hart HQ
subject: Did you hear the news?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1O0a0XEeZNBjCf68a4gJPidcENTi456f9IfckuEXQRM=/1oImPQHNL9h3qbVZL944k_g5KLlRrD8uJtfpi-JTZY0=?refcode=191106-email) _Welcome to another edition of the Rita Review! We 're fresh off the press (and the campaign trail) and we're excited to show you what we've been up to. Read all about it below_ ⬇️⬇️ **Our Campaign has a new team member!** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1O0a0XEeZNBjCf68a4gJPidcENTi456f9IfckuEXQRM=/1oImPQHNL9h3qbVZL944k_g5KLlRrD8uJtfpi-JTZY0=?refcode=191106-email) Just in case you missed the big announcement, we'd like you to meet our new finance director, Kim Kaiser! Kim packed up her campaign cat and came back to Iowa because she knows the Midwest is best. When she's not raising money, you can usually find her giving Zach, our campaign manager, and Jackson, our wonderful staffer, a hard time or outside with Buck. We're excited to have her on the team; we know she'll be a valuable asset as we continue to fundraise from small-dollar donations throughout the rest of the campaign 😄. **Pies, pies and more pies!** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1O0a0XEeZNBjCf68a4gJPidcENTi456f9IfckuEXQRM=/1oImPQHNL9h3qbVZL944k_g5KLlRrD8uJtfpi-JTZY0=?refcode=191106-email) On Sunday, October 20th, we were joined by Rep. Dave Loebsack for Rita's 7th annual pie auction. There were ample pies and a whole bunch of people coming together to break bread (er, crust) and raise money to send Rita to Washington! **Harvest Time on the Farm** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1O0a0XEeZNBjCf68a4gJPidcENTi456f9IfckuEXQRM=/1oImPQHNL9h3qbVZL944k_g5KLlRrD8uJtfpi-JTZY0=?refcode=191106-email) The changing weather and cooling breeze can only mean one thing: it's harvest time! Even between campaign stops and traveling throughout IA-2, Rita still helps her husband, Paul, on their family farm. With the spring rains and early snow this fall, there's still a lot of work to be done! Even Buck likes to lend a paw whenever Rita and Paul need it. Living and working on the farm may be stressful sometimes, but it's a great place to live (and build our campaign!). More importantly, it shows that she doesn't just understand rural voices and the needs of the agricultural economy in Iowa, she lives it. **Meeting with Folks Across the District** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1O0a0XEeZNBjCf68a4gJPidcENTi456f9IfckuEXQRM=/1oImPQHNL9h3qbVZL944k_g5KLlRrD8uJtfpi-JTZY0=?refcode=191106-email) It was a busy month! We attended the JoCo Dems BBQ, the Ottumwa Octoberfest parade and the Des Moines County Dems Fundraiser and we had a blast. We also met and talked with supporters from all walks of life at the Wayne County meet n greet, Iowa State Letter Carriers Association, Iowa City meet and greet and QC Federation of Labor Hall of Fame. Whew, we're tired just typing that all out. **Our Campaign is Getting Press** We know you don't just read the Rita review. So check out the _Iowa City Press-Citizen 's_ article on Rita! She got to sit down and speak on the issues that are directly affecting our district. With Rita taking our voices to Washington, we can count on her to fight for our education, healthcare and give us a voice on how we fight climate change. [You can read that article here](https://act.myngp.com/el/1O0a0XEeZNBjCf68a4gJPidcENTi456f9IfckuEXQRM=/HsuJ8ZGXBAV_cP0883MCmUZoTzyFuXdqgvYPPszTPtk=) _Well, that 's it for this edition of the Rita Review. Tune in next month to see what's going on in and around the campaign. Thanks for reading!_ | _**Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District. Help us send Rita to Washington by donating any amount today!**_ | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/1O0a0XEeZNBjCf68a4gJPidcENTi456f9IfckuEXQRM=/1oImPQHNL9h3qbVZL944k_g5KLlRrD8uJtfpi-JTZY0=?refcode=191106-email)
---

---

Wheatland IA 52777 United States

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: Kentucky
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
**Last night, in a huge upset, Kentucky elected a Democratic governor.**
We can't even begin to tell you what a big deal this is. Winning in Kentucky -- a state that Trump carried by over 30% -- means that Democrat Amy McGrath CAN defeat Mitch McConnell in 2020 and turn this Senate seat blue.
Seizing last night's momentum is critical, so we're hoping to raise $6,000 for Amy's campaign by midnight. [**Will you please help? $3 or more would go a really long way.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc32e/2a380d31/3d4e2ff3/f0eaaa/1812887949/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0bWNncmF0aCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkxMTA2X01XSDRNY2dyYXRoXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4mcgrath?refcode=e20191106_MWH4Mcgrath_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Yesterday proved that Kentucky voters are fed up with the Trump/McConnell agenda. Still, Kentucky has a history of electing far-right conservatives so if Amy is going to win, we've got to go all in for her.
[**Please rush $3 or as much as you can to Amy 's campaign right now. Ousting McConnell will be incredibly expensive, and she's counting on you to help her compete.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc32e/2a380d31/3d4e2ff3/f0eaaa/1812887949/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0bWNncmF0aCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkxMTA2X01XSDRNY2dyYXRoXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4mcgrath?refcode=e20191106_MWH4Mcgrath_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thanks so much -- let's do this!
Maggie's campaign staff
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc32e/2a380d31/3d4e2ff3/f0eaaa/1812887949/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0bWNncmF0aCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkxMTA2X01XSDRNY2dyYXRoXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4mcgrath?refcode=e20191106_MWH4Mcgrath_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

| Friend - this is not good news.

[New York Times: "Trump Is Remaining Competitive, If Not Popular"](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae6f/134673f2/a69c7a5/6997c0dd/2707755275/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae6f/134673f2/a69c7a5/6997c0dd/2707755275/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
Three months out from the Iowa caucus, Donald Trump is within the margin of error or beating the front runners in key swing states.

[Nine million voters voted twice for Barack Obama and once for Donald Trump.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae6f/134673f2/a69c7a5/6997c0dd/2707755275/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

It's crucial that we win these voters back in 2020, but this poll shows that the DNC's top choices are missing the mark.

The stark reality is that people in swing states will vote for Trump again if Democrats don't change course immediately.

[Friend, Michael is making it clear: We can't win these voters back with empty promises or more of the same.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae6f/134673f2/a69c7a5/6997c0dd/2707755275/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

body:

---
Peter,

Thanks to your incredible support, we hit our One Year Out fund goal -- but we can't stop there. I'm reaching out because **I need your help staying on track to build up a campaign that can compete with Senator John Cornyn and WIN**. I know the election is a ways away, but give me a minute and I'm going to explain why pitching in _right now_ is so important.

(If you're already with me, you can pitch in here: **[https://www.mjfortexas.com/FightBackFund](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890842/7f51f7bc/4bca2d32/4ef0b0fc/3194801124/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ4MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-scrrfund?refcode=email_20191106.1nd__480__&amount=10&recurring=true")**)

Senator Cornyn already aired the first TV ads of the campaign, thanks to the nearly $11 million war chest he amassed with lots of help from corporate PAC and special interest donors. He's not going to hold back. This race is already well underway, and it's clear it's going to be a long and expensive one. That's why pitching in right now is so critical.

Here's the deal: I don't have any corporate PACs pouring money into my campaign, hoping I'll play nice with them once I'm Senator. I'm not taking their money because **I will be accountable to the people, not special interests.**
**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890842/7f51f7bc/4bca2d32/4ef0b0fc/3194801124/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ4MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-scrrfund?refcode=email_20191106.1nd__480__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
**That means I can 't win without you. Can you pitch in?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Real Talk: Impeachment Is Going Poorly For Democrats and The Media
body:
“Inside of newsrooms, broadcast studios, and Twitter, impeachment is going according to plan.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1fac4c22d1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Real Talk: Impeachment Is Going Poorly For Democrats and The Media**

“Inside of newsrooms, broadcast studios, and Twitter, impeachment is going according to plan,” Mollie Hemingway writes in _The Federalist._ “Outside of those bubbles, it's not.”

Just how badly is it going? “The impeachment inquiry, such as it is, has tremendous struggles. It’s been conducted in secret, with heavy control from Rep. Adam Schiff, D-Calif., the man who falsely claimed for years he had evidence of Trump’s treasonous collusion with Russia to steal the 2016 election.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=94bfef9280&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump is keeping his word and getting America out of a bad deal. The poorly negotiated Paris climate accord imposed unfair, unworkable and unrealistic targets on the United States for reducing carbon emissions,” Sen. John Barrasso (R-WY) writes in [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c2f699aaea&e=3ee4985eea). “Countries like China got a free pass.”
---
|
---
| “President Trump has appointed, and the Senate has confirmed, 158 life-tenured federal judges . . . Few legacies will be longer lasting than this judicial one. These new judges are principled constitutionalists who have demonstrated excellence and professionalism throughout their legal careers,” Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) writes in [**Fox News**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=02e89457b4&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| As part of her signature Be Best initiative, First Lady Melania Trump is visiting Boston Medical Center today “to highlight a treatment program for infants born with Neonatal Abstinence Syndrome,” Travis Andersen reports for the [_Boston Globe_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bc75f953db&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “For all the demands from talking heads that the US deploy military personnel to police tribal disputes along the borders of Turkey, Iraq and Syria, the real border crisis facing the US is happening in our own backyard. Fact is, the situation in Mexico poses a far greater threat to American security. Our Southern neighbor is rapidly becoming a narco-state run by cartel drug lords,” Sean Davis writes in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=66e6b776f2&e=3ee4985eea) _._
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=29c5f43551&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e577f31c94&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ce4a3028eb)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: LIVE POLL: Dems win in KY, #MoscowMitch is next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter -- Last night, Democrats unseated GOP Kentucky Gov. Matt Bevin \-- even after Trump stumped for him and held an election eve rally Monday night in Lexington. A wildly unpopular Republican incumbent in Kentucky hellbent on taking away people's healthcare while buddying up to Trump turns out to be vulnerable at the ballot box. Sound familiar? As it turns out, Mitch McConnell doesn't have many friends in Kentucky either. A recent poll announced that McConnell is STILL the least popular senator in the United States, with a 50% in-state disapproval rating, compared to only 37% approval. Despite this, he somehow is one of the most powerful men in Washington, gleefully burying progressive legislation (and Merrick Garland's Supreme Court nomination) before it can even have a vote and stomping out dissent in his own ranks in the face of the president's high crimes and misdemeanors. This is not who we need in the Senate. We need someone who is going to listen to constituents, work with colleagues, and move this country forward. Fortunately, we have just that person in Amy McGrath. Her campaign is already going strong. In the third quarter alone, she raised a whopping $10.7 million \-- while Mitch only raised $2.3 million. We finally have a shot at unseating Mitch McConnell. McGrath's candidacy couldn't come at a better time. While McConnell has repeatedly protected Trump, ignored the Constitution, and defied basic human decency, he's also digging in deep to cheat his way to re-election. Secretary of Transportation Elaine Chao (who just so happens to be married to McConnell) appointed a special liaison to help with grant applications that benefit Kentucky. Her unethical behavior resulted in at least $78 million being spent in Kentucky ahead of her husband's impending re-election bid. She's also under investigation by the House Oversight Committee for using her position to get her family members lucrative business opportunities and loans, allegedly totalling in the hundreds of millions of dollars. Obviously McConnell and Chao will stop at nothing to hold onto this seat. We're asking voters what they think about this new development, and we need 105 more responses by MIDNIGHT: **Do you approve of Mitch McConnell?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc6f/6e9863e8/163f2a72/1db09df7/2669634979/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/aDH0kSyD") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc6f/6e9863e8/163f2a72/1db09df7/2669634979/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/aDH0kSyD") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc6f/6e9863e8/163f2a72/1db09df6/2669634979/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcgrathvmitch-nd?refcode=OUT20191106a.ND-b&refcode2=ViRW2oEBf7rVMlHACibS")
---
|
---

| | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
---

PO Box 15320
Washington, DC 20003

[Unsubscribe](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc6f/6e9863e8/163f2a72/1db09df5/2669634979/VEsC/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/unsubscribe")

While McConnell has repeatedly protected Trump, ignored the Constitution, and defied basic human decency, he's also digging in deep to cheat his way to re-election. Secretary of Transportation Elaine Chao (who just so happens to be married to McConnell) appointed a special liaison to help with grant applications that benefit Kentucky. Her unethical behavior resulted in at least $78 million being spent in Kentucky ahead of her husband's impending re-election bid. She's also under investigation by the House Oversight Committee for using her position to get her family members lucrative business opportunities and loans, allegedly totalling in the hundreds of millions of dollars. Obviously McConnell and Chao will stop at nothing to hold onto this seat. We're asking voters what they think about this new development, and we need 105 more responses by MIDNIGHT: Do you approve of Mitch McConnell? "" "" Thanks for your support, WDTO Team "" | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC PO Box 15320 Washington, DC 20003 ""

[**Jason Lewis's run for Senate in Minnesota means one big thing: we need to step up to help Democrat Tina Smith**** _right now_****. Chip in $3 to support her re-election.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cb66/6cd27893/520f0a93/15878b0d/1395822083/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-tinasmith?refcode=2019-11-06-smith&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Trump's campaign has already made clear that Minnesota is a top target. It was the blue state Trump came closest to winning in 2016, losing by only about 1.5%. This time, with his own Minnesota mini-me on the ballot, Trump and the Republicans are coming hard at Minnesota and we have to help Tina be ready. There's a reason Lewis is an extremist darling. He's called people receiving government aid "parasites and scoundrels." He voted over and over to repeal the Affordable Care Act in his one term in Congress. You can bet the right-wing money machine will be all in for him. **We**** _need_****Tina Smith in the Senate. Our mission this election is crystal clear: Dump Trump, Ditch Mitch, Save America! We can't do that without winning in Minnesota.** [**Donate $3 today. Let's show Tina (and McConnell!) that we won't stand for Trump's mini-me in Minnesota!**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cb66/6cd27893/520f0a93/15878b0d/1395822083/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-tinasmith?refcode=2019-11-06-smith&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") **_Jeff_** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley and Tina Smith instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cb66/6cd27893/520f0a93/15878b0a/1395822083/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-tinasmith?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-11-06-smith&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cb66/6cd27893/520f0a93/15878b0b/1395822083/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-tinasmith?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-11-06-smith&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cb66/6cd27893/520f0a93/15878b08/1395822083/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-tinasmith?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-11-06-smith&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cb66/6cd27893/520f0a93/15878b09/1395822083/VEsO/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-tinasmith?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-11-06-smith&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: Mark Warner for Virginia
subject: Next up? 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We did it. We flipped both chambers of the General Assembly. Virginia is blue...for now. Unfortunately, we can't rest on our well-earned laurels. 2019 may be in the bag, but 2020 is right around the c
|
---
| | Derek,

**We did it.** We flipped both chambers of the General Assembly. Virginia is blue...**_for now_**.

Unfortunately, we can't rest on our well-earned laurels. 2019 may be in the bag, but 2020 is right around the corner. If we want to protect our recent progress here in Virginia, we have to send Mark Warner back to the Senate in November 2020.

**[Donate here to help Mark prepare for next year.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7fc/53d9897e/522eec56/1c89146c/1384384903/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMyMiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-2019to2020?refcode=20191106nd__322__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Make no mistake about it: Virginia Republicans are targeting Mark, despite their recent losses.

One of Mark's opponents is even claiming **his campaign is within "striking distance" of flipping the seat in 2020.**

Mark's re-election campaign in 2014 came down to the wire (_he won by only 0.8%_), so NOW is the time to invest in our grassroots campaign for 2020.

**If we want to have a fighting chance of keeping VA blue next year, we must start preparing now._Today._ Will you chip in to help Mark protect our hard-earned gains?** _If you've saved your payment name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Terrible news for our climate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
I'm furious. It’s clearer than ever we need new leadership in Washington; we need leaders who will stand up and fight for the Green New Deal. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FwE/ni0YAA/t.2wh/TRz614cXROSy6ReTV-8isA/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJGRhaVukZaMlZvGh566ODICPHZSpwwg1Rpsk4jCvzBErdN43-2BU-2Bc7xSi9lF2QIwpolfOny0OCAdZY-2B51666baNlUQv-2BhJcW-2FWICwI9JTxiGj6z1afteo-2BD5GiXBwVxBqTVE5xNmp-2BeVE7rzhJ39z6n7aiFPS8Ec4t11cjW77R1Doc9iggV6h7-2BLjuscKhkjHmJBQ1-2FJ0ofecohweINVDUt4UzV9wh65RHgy43VmGJIbgUgLoYi09RIGoNa1TV0xkrfOop41ryDF3fjlcR-2BaJop5l5RoXpWjVGnT43oLHcCVA-3D-3D/qTO_) Friend, this is terrible news for our climate. The Trump Administration has made it official that the United States will pull out of the Paris climate agreement. That makes the United States the _only_ country to pull out of this vital agreement. **I'm furious.** It's clearer than ever we need new leadership in Washington; we need leaders who will stand up and fight for the Green New Deal. Friend, I will be one of those leaders. But, before I can fight for climate action in Congress, I need to win this race. **[_Can you chip in what you can and send a climate champion to Washington?_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FwE/ni0YAA/t.2wh/TRz614cXROSy6ReTV-8isA/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJGRhaVukZaMlZvGh566ODICPHZSpwwg1Rpsk4jCvzBErdN43-2BU-2Bc7xSi9lF2QIwpqUSBdUPz-2F1mXmW8wz5TV0uNk-2Fc31JcUVR9Y7lvxZ6yTZtJsOGq7BgrXshMk97gdN3f11-2FX0uqi-2F88kjDuUMpJbpUwQyh3lGmCjPPOyDTr7WeD9NpB2-2FdvIZw1tzyL0yIpVzHdW-2FEh9X0gLA0OzzZyIkYH7MQrIV8QofBa-2FBUZR98NYeZU0yWTIBzzz-2FQgXKov2cGS4QPm27hUJ3VrQa29higLEbfqUxkN-2BkZ5oEJYIDA-3D-3D/U4kV)** [MAKE A GIFT](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FwE/ni0YAA/t.2wh/TRz614cXROSy6ReTV-8isA/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJGRhaVukZaMlZvGh566ODICPHZSpwwg1Rpsk4jCvzBErdN43-2BU-2Bc7xSi9lF2QIwprw-2BwSrrw9dyK3mAyM2Yp4yZibEXi-2BuxaTp4-2FQv2p-2FpkYQJZooRtGg4JqX1eHU6tKF4EP2xI7cYujiLAoIUInkJLhoQ6ze1kQKHe7vdySkwxGzXGuE5Jd189Fut6pRuI7-2BkbdFzt7WvN3LWw8W00Xgwewi4WJ-2BwzdHJXoqQt51wqQ-2F5aF5vzHj57xfXCKauZKrDo88g2a9D2cwKIsipytXj3C9Qp52TrjZKWuvyhsT1Cg-3D-3D/bxLf) We're already seeing the effects of climate change, and they are _absolutely terrifying._ As you read this, thousands of acres of land are on fire in California, which has forced more than 100,000 people to evacuate. Each year, we see stronger storms and more extreme weather patterns. **We are living in a climate catastrophe.** The evidence is before our very eyes. And still, too many of our elected leaders bury their heads in the sand. Trump is pulling out of a vital climate agreement at the very time we need urgent climate action. Look, Donald Trump won't see the full breadth of the devastation that climate change will bring. My generation, and those who come after, will be the ones forced to witness and live through the destruction of our planet. **I will not sit by any longer – and I know you won't, either.** Together, let's win this race and add another voice to the rising chorus of people demanding a Green New Deal now.
