clean_body: I'm furious. It’s clearer than ever we need new leadership in Washington; we need leaders who will stand up and fight for the Green New Deal. | | | Friend, this is terrible news for our climate. The Trump Administration has made it official that the United States will pull out of the Paris climate agreement. That makes the United States the only country to pull out of this vital agreement. I'm furious. It's clearer than ever we need new leadership in Washington; we need leaders who will stand up and fight for the Green New Deal. Friend, I will be one of those leaders. But, before I can fight for climate action in Congress, I need to win this race. We're already seeing the effects of climate change, and they are absolutely terrifying. As you read this, thousands of acres of land are on fire in California, which has forced more than 100,000 people to evacuate. Each year, we see stronger storms and more extreme weather patterns. We are living in a climate catastrophe. The evidence is before our very eyes. And still, too many of our elected leaders bury their heads in the sand. Trump is pulling out of a vital climate agreement at the very time we need urgent climate action. Look, Donald Trump won't see the full breadth of the devastation that climate change will bring. My generation, and those who come after, will be the ones forced to witness and live through the destruction of our planet. I will not sit by any longer – and I know you won't, either. Together, let's win this race and add another voice to the rising chorus of people demanding a Green New Deal now. We owe it to every generation yet to come. Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . Friend,

In yesterday’s election, Democrats made historic gains in typically Republican strongholds.

The Virginia state legislature was completely flipped for the first time in nearly a quarter century and in deep-red Kentucky, Trump country, the Democrat has already claimed victory in the still too close to call Governor’s race.

[](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=1cf6a52d23714f27a369388e9234c7fc&_e=KO_CajjH63ycUgEihjPSUK_fHINbnP9NBM8MzZgiloERN8_1uA2W23tN-sCwOy6CznkgLLkOUNByoGiYDIWZwNEjWV_V0VXvvWusd5WCuYAVkt0shA2YiG6-PfX-DAUuCHMk_h1oto7sd7QYIG-miCyYa84-OfdmhMQQ5zf3l7Ii9oCxNHCV8-m5y_fB4d70vz4gy_LjU295IG6bsdxcQl0yCyKL1y4oIILURnkTVXLbtnezXuHijrfj_tg5VC8nlXHdAu5xs7RsvBCjgpLTBFiNRmhjLkbE8hwScHYi4LU3t57RLJO6XI3M_7l4lKvxOSWTipT0C3TuXty0XN7LcUHf3A4qsBTcoozmb9hMOPeJba_p7tVRtqZjPQW9BRkaVU2LV2YMs0xjJRvAUVG2Xw%3D%3D)
I’ll be blunt, Friend. These results are alarming.

Democrats are not only competing but **winning** in states Republicans must hold if we’re going to keep control of the U.S. Senate and re-elect President Trump.

Now that Democrats see they can win in Kentucky - they’ll set their sights on Montana.

The Left sees the Montana U.S. Senate seat as their only path back to the majority so **[it’s critical we bolster our campaign war-chest now before Democrats strike first in Montana and seize on their growing national momentum.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=1cf6a52d23714f27a369388e9234c7fc&_e=KO_CajjH63ycUgEihjPSUK_fHINbnP9NBM8MzZgiloERN8_1uA2W23tN-sCwOy6CznkgLLkOUNByoGiYDIWZwNEjWV_V0VXvvWusd5WCuYAVkt0shA2YiG6-PfX-DAUuCHMk_h1oto7sd7QYIG-miCyYa84-OfdmhMQQ5zf3l7LDdNYsKuN_cUzlwknw1pD_vpn9lw1DVbx5UqsvbVmgbG_DCEgOuX9WGwjfZaAp6IHHxag-o3Yz2INpuLBTzTu9h6bCViziB2pG5txMV7y8PaMdWnzo0SsDSjaIKoqUntrlLM2xTNIrzPPtqD_Lyz9hIsoXTs092lacKwjuBRUMHhXOlpMs8lWmvCN_XTXOkKgs0CUq1tOncN59j3Gg9jcU953kCkkpguQnRWMrCy3Rtw%3D%3D)**

Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi have a vision for our country that is truly frightening: Take control of the U.S. House and Senate, impeach President Trump, and implement their radical agenda on all of us.

We can’t under any circumstances let the Democrats' victories last night distract us from stopping socialism from infecting our country. We can’t let them win in 2020.

**[I need your support today in order to stay in my steadfast fight to help President Trump Keep America Great and make sure Republicans hold the U.S. Senate majority in 2020.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=1cf6a52d23714f27a369388e9234c7fc&_e=KO_CajjH63ycUgEihjPSUK_fHINbnP9NBM8MzZgiloERN8_1uA2W23tN-sCwOy6CznkgLLkOUNByoGiYDIWZwNEjWV_V0VXvvWusd5WCuYAVkt0shA2YiG6-PfX-DAUuCHMk_h1oto7sd7QYIG-miCyYa84-OfdmhMQQ5zf3l7LhUJ4jXxgrRkOWb2X3_6kDXiVwiIpN_7u0-Nxt00VlOqQwMimE7AF3uMFg0ArbilJ6Hpl6XoLN3SLN_QFg36_HAgvTnagPBPvTa4yWXPirbetl8I6kaXMTi4dewB0BgPJdxW7DAsc5pBEu2z_RgSLGAO-DcB1Lz9v-rhUPrSWXeXl952o9WJHHf6EGFWo3HtMsmWQz2Ji0ouRfI7Uu5BVQD6jtUId53g-V76i7iOOzKw%3D%3D)**

Thanks,

Senator Steve Daines

[ **DONATE » **](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=1cf6a52d23714f27a369388e9234c7fc&_e=KO_CajjH63ycUgEihjPSUK_fHINbnP9NBM8MzZgiloERN8_1uA2W23tN-sCwOy6CznkgLLkOUNByoGiYDIWZwNEjWV_V0VXvvWusd5WCuYAVkt0shA2YiG6-PfX-DAUuCHMk_h1oto7sd7QYIG-miCyYa84-OfdmhMQQ5zf3l7LHyfkRcNy2vMgnzNX_5NOXmBNRnotsFk_3DwPi-L7_Ji66RPrrOYJjFHHnqBnSJwtRrPmrj5BU4Ska8pQSVpbyK0gk1an7QL8u4rmT3mWXTdeOzdfc2Xu-v0Ag28dZn6F85cl63mYh0bwg2QcytYX5xj9la7sD503hmUA9P0z4w17gAqED7z2BS9ulvnKPACpFlV5QATNv81Eb_gEXyeZ6fcM8lxmyiCAP8nwgdrSiQw%3D%3D)

name: The Way Ahead Team
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead The Way Ahead
body:
Last night, you helped Virginia make history.
| | | [](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21d7/39260142/4241cd35/626394b8/2849702784/VEsH/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vamajority2019")
---
Friends-- Last night, you helped Virginia make history. For the first time in over 20 years, Democrats now control both chambers of the General Assembly and the Governor's mansion. We have historic numbers in both the House of Delegates and the State Senate. These newly elected leaders are ready to work with Governor Northam to enact a bold agenda to keep moving Virginia forward. Thank you for everything you did to help make this historic moment happen. Together, we have turned Virginia bright blue, and we will keep making progress for Virginia's families in the years ahead. \- The Way Ahead Team

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Warren 2020
subject: Some recent news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
All these headlines have something in common: The wealthy and well-connected are scared. Scared that under a Warren Administration, they would finally have to pay their fair share. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528e35/45c30650/106015c0e/66f52c0f/1872438933/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

_"As Warren Gains in Race, Wall Street Sounds the Alarm" - New York Times

"Billionaire Leon Cooperman warns Elizabeth Warren is 'taking the country down a very wrong path'" - Business Insider

"Wall Street's Scorn for Elizabeth Warren Boils Over" - Forbes

"Jamie Dimon says Sen. Elizabeth Warren 'vilifies successful people'" - CNBC

"Cranky Billionaire Scolds Elizabeth Warren for Not Being Nice to Rich People" - Vanity Fair_

All these headlines have something in common: **The wealthy and well-connected are scared.**

Scared that under a Warren Administration, they would finally have to pay their fair share.

And they're right to be scared -- for too long, we've had a Washington that caters to the needs of the richest and most powerful among us. That ends in a Warren presidency.

**Together, we're going to make sure Washington works for everyone. And if grassroots supporters who are ready for big, structural change in Pennsylvania and all across the country chip in $3, $10, or whatever they can afford, we can build a movement that fights back -- and we can win.**

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: re: what happened on Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

Last night in Kentucky and across Virginia, we saw a road map to the change we can bring to Iowa’s 4th district next November and that road leads right through rural America.

**Democrat Andy Beshear beat Republican Governor Matt Bevin in a state Donald Trump won by more than 30 points in 2016. Virginia Democrats now control the House, Senate and the Governorship for the first time in more than two decades.**

Andy won by offering a clear vision for the kind of common-sense change his constituents need while his opponent ran an increasingly divisive campaign.

While Matt Bevin spent his time in the Governor’s mansion cutting essential programs and vilifying public school teachers, Andy offered the chance of a brighter future to the people of Kentucky.

In Virginia, countless volunteers and activists proved that hard work and organizing pay off— even in ruby red areas.

**Last night's elections are a clear sign: If we keep up our momentum through the next twelve months, and maintain our focus on rural voters and rural issues, we can defeat Steve King.**

**_[To do this, I need you with us. Chip in any amount you can and help our campaign fight for the change we need.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11607558/118350853/-1319866263?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmNkMWZhYi1lZDAwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iYeErGfajRFZ5gMwP3Vw-yWljGzBRkj5UK7l--T6XIo=&refcode=em19_191106_kentucky_jd_l1)_**

Thank you, as always, for helping me stand tall for all.

-J.D. Scholten

clean_body: Peter -- Last night in Kentucky and across Virginia, we saw a road map to the change we can bring to Iowa’s 4th district next November and that road leads right through rural America. Democrat Andy Beshear beat Republican Governor Matt Bevin in a state Donald Trump won by more than 30 points in 2016. Virginia Democrats now control the House, Senate and the Governorship for the first time in more than two decades. Andy won by offering a clear vision for the kind of common-sense change his constituents need while his opponent ran an increasingly divisive campaign. While Matt Bevin spent his time in the Governor’s mansion cutting essential programs and vilifying public school teachers, Andy offered the chance of a brighter future to the people of Kentucky. In Virginia, countless volunteers and activists proved that hard work and organizing pay off— even in ruby red areas. Last night's elections are a clear sign: If we keep up our momentum through the next twelve months, and maintain our focus on rural voters and rural issues, we can defeat Steve King. Thank you, as always, for helping me stand tall for all. -J.D. Scholten

name: Christina Finello
subject: Exciting news!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Hey Peter! I’m writing to share some very exciting news: after months of knocking on doors, making phone calls, and talking to voters all over our district, Democrats took control of the Bucks County government in yesterday’s election for the first time in 34 years! Because of all our hard work, Democrats flipped the Bucks County Board of Commissioners from 2-1 Republican to 2-1 Democrat. And we SWEPT all four county row office races, which means Democrats now hold 8 out of 9 of these countywide positions. In Montgomery County, voters re-elected the Democratic commissioners by a 50,000 vote margin AND elected several Democrats in highly competitive local races in the MontCo part of our district. Our major victories in Bucks coupled with our wins in Montgomery County are proof that as we get closer and closer to the 2020 election, PA-01 is trending blue. The strong Democratic turnout across the district and historic wins yesterday have laid the foundation for what we know will be even BIGGER wins next November. We can win PA-01 in 2020, but only if we’re able to work together, day-in and day-out, to build on 2019’s success by sharing our vision and turning out every voter. Election Day 2020 is less than a year away now, and we can’t do this without you. [**If you’re ready to bring home another sweeping victory next Election Day, join our efforts by making a contribution to power our grassroots campaign forward.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11608653/118365995/2147019686?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTc5MzhhOC1mMzAwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y1Cb-YEIVzH675gd0aTjIp2_MESNbpAzd_5qUXrtJRs=&refcode=CFN20191106c&refcode2=ZkqfFweIW9s8wTL6Z1TT) Let’s turn it blue! name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: More revelations come with inquiry transcripts release
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Yesterday's release of new interview transcripts from key witnesses has led to Trump's own appointees admitting that he and his accomplices engaged in a deliberate quid pro quo with Ukraine and that they tried to cover up their crimes. These transcripts only confirm what we've known about Trump for years: he is a corrupt, egotistical, power-hungry, narcissistic man-child who is willing to do anything to get his way, including destroying the presidency and sacrificing U.S. power and prestige. Nancy Pelosi eloquently summed up what's going on: "The times have found us." The lessons we learned in civics classes, the moments the Founding Fathers warned us about, the lines we thought our government would never cross. They have found us. body:
I’ve been added to the NRCC’s Young Guns program as an “On the Radar” candidate after only one month of running for Congress. | |
---
[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=379160b47a654c38ab10904a9e18ac88&_e=hP-ya5JSj0QnsN1rzuhjAMIm7y1os9HKqIbhFIqICgPHwEWTPWDhVE2wDTRRWqSoBV863hgucPGbHG-rec43EnA34ja7n-2U4oSBr0BowQh459qEzRBj39Ur1LaMTAy8spZ9j1oYvT03OMgDLkalUylp5Xa6ol6llQXKzK2lS6oDx7eNuLXSeMkIUefWtasMECUZIAZ8hUyrZaHyKztEukhX73CBvRUr51ITMup-_ygGn9QXuxHMs8AEc4RkP18RRsiIq5awH86SxREC5MqIOHket0htfKKN_B23np0B-xvet1R5USuE17EdudABV1n9D2J6YcdL3B81gcGnIikcSiKGMwwC6X_0JAHbT8Fcumku0gb-Iu5ghe3ttgItg9eFMILgWw5bN3UaL6yJCH0VWTHh5LP7HB1rDPVhDMFjv1o%3D)

Peter, I just received some very exciting news about our campaign.

**The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) has added me to their Young Guns program as an “On the Radar” candidate after only one month of our campaign. I am the only Republican in this race to receive this distinction.**

This program will help us secure more resources so that we can continue to fight tooth and nail for Upstate New York.

**We need to keep up the momentum from this huge announcement. Can you chip in to help me stay competitive in this race?**
[ **CHIP IN NOW** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=379160b47a654c38ab10904a9e18ac88&_e=hP-ya5JSj0QnsN1rzuhjAMIm7y1os9HKqIbhFIqICgPHwEWTPWDhVE2wDTRRWqSoBV863hgucPGbHG-rec43EnA34ja7n-2U4oSBr0BowQh459qEzRBj39Ur1LaMTAy8spZ9j1oYvT03OMgDLkalUylp5Xa6ol6llQXKzK2lS6oDx7eNuLXSeMkIUefWtasMECUZIAZ8hUyrZaHyKztEuhZuqXB118ciUmuNZ19g-smeVS1_uuluVlUnoMHcse-cv_-l5uECHhzcG9c340HpdL5vwRntfzmekjtD6rucmNF1SHn_hsMNhIA8t3fBhZTzhysoEdV9Vm-ymujuA7lBqQtXBAXUQKkiC2tiolLBEWz8GMwURVccgjGk1iteOZRMCHkDhAqlpi3VzWC1nCwLrlMcqkcodHixAb0OElU0kEs%3D)
My experience in Albany and Washington is resonating with voters. In Washington, I fought against job killing regulations, advocated for the 2nd Amendment, and stood up for small business owners.

But, this will be a brutal election, and I will need all the help that I can get to make sure that I can continue to fight for Upstate New York.

**[Will you rush in whatever you can now to help me defeat Anthony Brindisi.>>>](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=379160b47a654c38ab10904a9e18ac88&_e=hP-ya5JSj0QnsN1rzuhjAMIm7y1os9HKqIbhFIqICgPHwEWTPWDhVE2wDTRRWqSoBV863hgucPGbHG-rec43EnA34ja7n-2U4oSBr0BowQh459qEzRBj39Ur1LaMTAy8spZ9j1oYvT03OMgDLkalUylp5Xa6ol6llQXKzK2lS6oDx7eNuLXSeMkIUefWtasMECUZIAZ8hUyrZaHyKztEuiviSr929-FBuPXm3ysi9OrmM-hc47Xn29pdW6Aj4MHg2PeTIEMG28Hw6Gmlx7RW1OiaPiTdEdnlue6XV9FI43ywT7lhgo6gu1MF8j5EkpKd3U_2hkm-7eM7Eg-NLyI56-b0Kl7ePGtkksoWetnK3wVQlHedFpG2s9qD9iTlkPnPKqcQqD1k0XajRIkppZULuP9zFqI9fgWX82Bh8Zl9X4s%3D)**

Claudia Tenney

name: Jason Yates
subject: Tell the Supreme Court to reverse Roe v. Wade
body:
Sign the petition today!
Hi Peter,
The Supreme Court has an opportunity, right in front of them, to overturn Roe v. Wade.
**Our friends at The Moral Outcry have launched a petition seeking the signatures of 500,000 Americans to be filed in an Amicus Curiae Brief (a friend of the court brief) for the Supreme Court by November 11. The brief will call on the Supreme Court to reverse Roe v. Wade.**
The controversial Louisiana abortion law case, June Medical Services v. Gee, will be heard this term by the Supreme Court. We want to make sure the Court hears from you and millions of Christians across the nation who want to see a decision for the protection of life.
**So far, The Moral Outcry has gathered over 250,000 signatures, but we need your help to reach the 500,000 goal. Will you please use the link below to sign the petition?**
[https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/the-moral-outcry-petition](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/the-moral-outcry-petition?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191106com01&n=1)
When you sign the petition, your name will be added to the Supreme Court brief filed on behalf of Melina Thybault and the Moral Outcry Petition. I hope I can count on you to sign the brief and pray for this case before the Supreme Court.
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191106com01&n=2)
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191106com01&n=3).

Chip in now to keep our movement strong and growing!**](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/363908f0/55b66746/2cd3593c/80f2e36/314321871/VEsO/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-11-06-opening&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") The best campaigns are built from the ground up--from a swell of grassroots support, people banding together to fight for something better. We have pretty big task in front of us; we're looking to get rid of entrenched systems and build a democracy that serves all people. That's a tall order. But tall order or not, we're doing it. **And**** _everyone_****is in:** [](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/363908f0/55b66746/2cd3593c/80f2e36/314321871/VEsP/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-11-06-opening&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") I'm proud to be a part of this team, and honored to stand by your side. clean_body: | "" | | Last night's exciting election results in Virginia and Kentucky tell a story: Enthusiasm from grassroots Democrats continues to build a blue wave that's restoring power to the people, not the powerful. Here in Massachusetts, that same enthusiasm is evident across the commonwealth. Team Kennedy is growing every single day. "" You know what? Rather than tell you all about our movement, I'll show you. Check out these photos: This weekend, our movement was out in force. On Saturday, over 200 supporters joined us to officially open our new campaign HQ! "" As soon as we wrapped that party, Joe and our street team spread out across the commonwealth, meeting with folks at house parties "" classrooms, "" fire stations, "" and at the doorstep. "" That's what we're doing on the ground, because our movement isn't just about electing a new senator; it's about rebuilding government at all levels so that it works for everyone. Most of all, it's about welcoming people back in to a system that's overlooked them, shut them out, or pushed them to the side. "" The best campaigns are built from the ground up--from a swell of grassroots support, people banding together to fight for something better. We have pretty big task in front of us; we're looking to get rid of entrenched systems and build a democracy that serves all people. That's a tall order. But tall order or not, we're doing it. And everyoneis in: "" I'm proud to be a part of this team, and honored to stand by your side. "" Stephanie Statewide Organizing Director Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts. ---|--- | This email was sent by "". name: Tate Reeves
subject: Thank you, Mississippi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tate for Governor
body:
I promise to fight for your family, your rights, and your small businesses.
Hi,
After our incredible victory last night, **I have just one thing to say: thank you, Mississippi. **

We won last night because hardworking people like you across the state donated your time and money, spread the word about our campaign, and got out to the polls yesterday.

I ran for Governor because we owe it to our state to continue the progress we've made through strong conservative leadership. As your Governor, I promise to fight for your family, your rights, and your small businesses.

That's what this campaign has been about from the beginning. Thank you for all your support—I look forward to getting to work for all of you.

For Mississippi,

Tate Reeves

Paid for by Tate for Governor

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: Election 2019: Record-Setting
body:
By any measure, Election Day 2019 was an overwhelming success for Indiana Republicans. We made unprecedented gains in mayoral races across the... |
---
| |
---
| Hoosier Republican -

By any measure, Election Day 2019 was an overwhelming success for Indiana Republicans.

Election 2019 will be remembered as a record-setting night for the Indiana Republican Party. We made unprecedented gains in mayoral races across the state, ending the night with a record-setting 70 wins. When our new Republican mayors are all sworn in, Indiana will have the largest number of GOP-led cities in the history of our state. This is a testament to the strength of our candidates, the hard work and support of the state party, and the organization and enthusiasm of grassroots Republican volunteers in all corners of our state.

Republicans flipped 19 mayoral seats, 17 Democrat and 2 independents. This included former Democrat strongholds of Kokomo, Muncie, Logansport and Michigan City.

Republicans will now hold 23 more mayoral offices than Democrats, another record.

Some highlights:
* Tyler Moore brings the Kokomo mayor’s office back into the Republican column for the first time in over a decade, cruising to victory with 68% of the vote and sweeping city council races as well.
* Dan Ridenour led a Republican wave in Muncie, taking back the mayor’s office and ushering in a GOP-majority city council. This is the first time in forty years the GOP has controlled the Muncie City Council.
* In Michigan City, voters rejected the embattled Democrat mayor and elected Republican Duane Parry, who campaigned on cleaning up city hall and restoring trust in local government.
* Democrats in Evansville and Columbus didn’t even oppose Republican mayors Lloyd Winnecke and Jim Lienhoop.
* Salem will have its first Republican mayor in 34 years when Justin Green is sworn in.
* The voters of Jeffersonville gave four more for Moore as Mike Moore easily secured a third term.
* Matt Murphy is keeping the Valpo mayor’s office in Republican hands.

This trend continued throughout the state. Terre Haute, Lawrence, Logansport, Winchester, Bluffton, Hartford City and Greensburg—just to name a few—all elected Republican mayors. A full list of elected Republican mayors is available below my signature.

The Indiana Republican Party was involved in upwards of 45 municipal elections this year, investing over $250,000 and unleashing an army of grassroots staff and volunteers who made hundreds of thousands of phone calls and knocked on thousands of doors.

While yesterday was a historic day for Hoosier Republicans, we’re not ignoring those races where we came up short. The opposition flipped some mayoral and city council seats in central Indiana and defeated some of our strong mayoral candidates in targeted cities. We will work extremely hard to win back those voters who didn’t vote Republican this cycle. We’ll also have deep benches from which to recruit stellar candidates when it comes time to win back those offices and expand our map even more.

The Indiana Republican Party is competitive in areas where we’d long been written off. We’re playing the entire board and making Democrats compete everywhere, which they simply cannot do. This is how we’ve built a dominate political organization, including winning every statewide race, both United States Senate seats, seven of nine US House seats, over 80% of county offices throughout the state, supermajorities in both houses of the state legislature and, now, 70 mayoral offices in Indiana.

This strength reflects the continued upward trajectory of our party under Governor Holcomb’s leadership. Election 2019 bodes well for the strength of our apparatus as we now begin the 2020 election cycle.

Thank you for your continued support of Indiana Republicans. Together, we’re Putting People First and delivering real results for Hoosiers in all corners of our state.

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Mitch McConnell's very bad day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Just like us, Amy McGrath is up against McConnell's dark money fundraising machine, and she needs us behind her. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771460/691c9bd/6fff8f24/11a785b1/3444855498/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| | **The results in Kentucky last night prove that we can defeat Mitch McConnell next year --split a donation with Amy McGrath's campaign now.**

[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-mcgrath?refcode=em_fr_20191106_JH_20191106-fr-JH-mcgrath-all_all_callout&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---

Team,

Last night was a big night for Democrats across the country--**especially in Kentucky, where voters turned out in huge numbers to defeat Trump ally Matt Bevin and elect Democrat Andy Beshear as their next Governor and Jacqueline Coleman as their next Lt. Governor.**

Beshear won counties last night that Donald Trump took by double digits in 2016, a great sign that not only can we take back the Senate next year, but we have a shot at getting Mitch McConnell out of Congress completely--and Amy McGrath is running to do just that.

**But team, it won 't be easy.** Just like us, Amy McGrath is fighting tooth and nail against McConnell's dark money fundraising machine, and we need to have her back.

**We 're all in this together. Today, can you split a donation between our campaign and Amy McGrath's?**
_If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._

clean_body: Just like us, Amy McGrath is up against McConnell's dark money fundraising machine, and she needs us behind her. | | | "" | | The results in Kentucky last night prove that we can defeat Mitch McConnell next year --split a donation with Amy McGrath's campaign now. "=" Team, Last night was a big night for Democrats across the country--especially in Kentucky, where voters turned out in huge numbers to defeat Trump ally Matt Bevin and elect Democrat Andy Beshear as their next Governor and Jacqueline Coleman as their next Lt. Governor. Beshear won counties last night that Donald Trump took by double digits in 2016, a great sign that not only can we take back the Senate next year, but we have a shot at getting Mitch McConnell out of Congress completely--and Amy McGrath is running to do just that. But team, it won 't be easy. Just like us, Amy McGrath is fighting tooth and nail against McConnell's dark money fundraising machine, and we need to have her back. We 're all in this together. Today, can you split a donation between our campaign and Amy McGrath's? If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
This is huge, everyone: Democrat Andy Beshear defeated Republican incumbent Matt Bevin in Kentucky's gubernatorial race last night.
**This is important both because Democrats flipped a governor 's mansion in a state that President Trump won by 30 points, and because it shows that Mitch McConnell is extremely vulnerable.**
Amy McGrath is a former Marine fighter pilot who is running to unseat him. She'll make an excellent Senator, and she needs our help.
[**I told her that this team would help raise $6,000 for her campaign today, and you 're critical to that effort, everyone. name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: We Can Do Better Than Thoughts and Prayers
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Marc Flores for Congress
body:
Solutions to Make Our Community Safer

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=1543307b82-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_16_08_11_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-1543307b82-32267927
Hello Peter,

100 people are killed in the U.S. by gun violence every day, not to mention the thousands more who are injured.

Around our homes, on our streets, and in our schools — it feels like nowhere is safe anymore. This isn’t the reality any of us want. Parents shouldn’t have to send their kids to school fearing for their safety; worshipers shouldn’t feel at risk when attending service; party-goers shouldn’t wonder if their lives are in danger when they go to celebrate.

Saturday, two young men were shot and killed and a dozen were injured while attending a Halloween party in Greenville (https://www.nbcdfw.com/news/local/Mass-Shooting-Reported-at-Homecoming-Party-in-Greenville-Outside-of-Dallas-563934821.html?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=1543307b82-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_16_08_11_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-1543307b82-32267927) .

Something has to change.

My heart breaks for their families, but I know words aren’t nearly enough. Thoughts and prayers are not enough. We need action, and we need it NOW. This violence has to end. We MUST fight for sensible gun safety laws.

As your representative, I will address our gun violence epidemic head-on. No more empty promises from ineffective leaders in the face of yet another mass shooting that terrorizes our city or our country.

I am committed to enacting sensible gun legislation including: banning weapons of war, requiring background checks on every firearm sale, and closing the “boyfriend loophole.”

It’s time for real leadership on this issue. Only then can we end this violent epidemic and hold the corrupt accountable.

- Marc

name: Tina Smith
subject: [TELL CONGRESS]: Make medications more affordable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I believe health care is a human right. And that means everyone should be able to afford the life saving medications they need. We need Congress to act now to make drug prices more affordable. Will yo

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-nov2019?refcode=em191106rxdrugs-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team,

As I travel across Minnesota, people in living rooms, auditoriums, and community centers all over the state ask why vital prescription medications have to cost someone their life savings.

The answer is: They don't.

But nearly one in four Americans say they struggle every day to cover costs for the medicine they need. That's why one of my most important fights in Washington is to lower prescription drug prices. We must value people first, not Big Pharma's profits.

**[I'm calling on Congress to pass legislation to lower the cost of prescription drugs -- and I'm asking you to join me. Will you add your name now?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc40414/c1f7015/66cd4b9a/11453ba2/4110750421/VEsE/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/rx-drug-prices/smith/#subsource=em191106rxdrugs-full")**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc40414/c1f7015/66cd4b9a/11453ba2/4110750421/VEsF/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/rx-drug-prices/smith/#subsource=em191106rxdrugs-full")

I believe health care is a human right. No one should be forced to skip doses or ration drugs.

Every day Congress delays passing this and other important legislation is another day people across the country struggle to afford their medicine.

**[Don't let Big Pharma win again: Add your name now to call on Congress to pass legislation to make prescription drugs more affordable.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc40414/c1f7015/66cd4b9a/11453ba2/4110750421/VEsC/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/rx-drug-prices/smith/#subsource=em191106rxdrugs-full")**

We can't let pharmaceutical companies get even richer while leaving behind people who can't afford life-saving medicine. I'm counting on you to raise your voice in this fight.

Thanks for taking a stand,

Tina

| **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-nov2019?refcode=em191106rxdrugs-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

MJ knows how to take on a hard fight. She's already traveled 8,000 miles across Texas and proven her mettle to 20,000 donors who have pitched in to support her, all while taking $0 from corporate PACs.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Impeachment makes re-election much harder for Susan Collins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Republican Susan Collins has served in the Senate for 22 years \-- and according to CNN, this election will be her toughest yet, with her waffling stance on supporting Trump and her refusal to condemn him looming large. Now that she's also refused to take a stance on the impeachment inquiry, it's become even more clear that she has to be voted out. Her deciding vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court is already unpopular in Maine \-- she has a job approval rating of just 35 percent in her home state, and _Cook Political Report_ has now classified her seat as a "toss-up". Democrats have NO CHANCE of taking back the Senate unless we win in Maine, and Susan Collins has never been this vulnerable! But Mitch McConnell knows his Senate majority depends on Maine, so he and the GOP will inundate the state with their usual dirty tricks, voter suppression, and an avalanche of dark money to hang on to power. Sara Gideon, the Democratic challenger, announced that she raised a whopping $3.2 million in Q3, with nearly 97 percent of those donations being less than $100 \-- donations from people like you who helped show Susan Collins that we won't stand for her any longer. [**Every dollar given goes toward helping Sara have another great grassroots showing so she can fight back against Mitch McConnell and Susan Collins. Can you pitch in by donating even just $1 today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc13/6e9863e8/163a78af/1db09c97/3910692863/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sara-gideon-nd?refcode=OUT20191106c.ND&refcode2=geOpxsIxMZT6G7pgzOji") Thank you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc13/6e9863e8/163a78af/1db09c96/3910692863/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sara-gideon-nd?refcode=OUT20191106c.ND&refcode2=geOpxsIxMZT6G7pgzOji")

name: Gary
subject: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
| | |
---
Friends: Cook Political Report, a campaign ratings agency, just increased my likelihood of losing. And my extreme opponent just announced he broke fundraising records thanks to Donald Trump funneling $3 MILLION into Michigan to defeat me, buy this seat and expand Mitch McConnell's majority in the Senate.

That's why I'm reaching out for your help - but first, I hope you'll give me just a minute to explain why it's so important we defend Michigan's Democratic Senate seat.

If we lose here, Democrats will throw away our only chance of taking back the Senate. That means two more years of Mitch McConnell calling the shots in Washington. That means he and Trump will team up to put more extremist justices like Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court.
I've won tough elections before, and I'm all in to do it again this time around. But polling shows me tied with my opponent, and analysts at The Washington Post rank me as one of the most targeted Democratic senators in the country.

The good news is that Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports Democrats can flip the Senate, but only if we first win in Michigan.

So with the future of the Senate on the line, in a race this close, every dollar could be the difference between winning and losing. We still need another 102 people to become Election Year Members before midnight tonight to win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats.

I'd appreciate it if you could give now, even just $3, to help us hit this goal and win. Here's the best link to donate - whatever you give will go toward keeping Michigan blue and taking back the Senate for Democrats: **[_https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email_](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa22/5721a3ed/71057e64/efa82ad/3036396731/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxMTMtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk113-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
Thank you - it means so much.

Gary

Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa22/5721a3ed/71057e64/efa82ab/3036396731/VEsF/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa22/5721a3ed/71057e64/efa82aa/3036396731/VEsC/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/update-your-info") We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. If you would like to unsubscribe from our emails, click [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa22/5721a3ed/71057e64/efa82ac/3036396731/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [Donate to Gary ->](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa22/5721a3ed/71057e64/efa82ab/3036396731/VEsB/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") |

| [BREAKING: Tulsi just qualified for the November presidential debate and as of right now we are just 8,897 unique donations away from qualifying for the December debate small dollar donor threshold.**We can hit it tonight if just 5% of the people reading this email right now gave $1. You in?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11612335/118419870/1281545749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTk1NTRmOS0xNDAxLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yBDS0pKUEsGcjrnwCOhWe68w5aOSX2SiYbgdrdy7CTI=&refcode=em191106_cta_ask&refcode2=de9554f9-1401-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68) [LET'S DO THIS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11612339/118419874/-1239230698?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTk1NTRmOS0xNDAxLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yBDS0pKUEsGcjrnwCOhWe68w5aOSX2SiYbgdrdy7CTI=&refcode=em191106_cta_button&refcode2=de9554f9-1401-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68) Friend — **We wanted you to be the first to hear the news:** Today’s Quinnipiac poll out of Iowa means Tulsi will be invited back on the debate stage in Atlanta in just two weeks — continuing to speak truth to power, holding the DNC and corporate media accountable to the people and representing all of us in our fight for a more perfect union. You did this, friend. Polls should never supplant the democratic process embodied in our primary and caucus system, but they can show trends over time and our 100% grassroots momentum is growing stronger every day — especially in the critical early states where Tulsi is on the ground, speaking directly to voters. **We just closed on our strongest fundraising month to date, and as of right now we’re only 8,897 donations away from hitting the unique donor threshold required to qualify for the December debate.** [**We’re SO close. If just 5% of the people reading this email right now give $1 — or any amount you can spare — we can hit the December debate small dollar fundraising threshold. Will you help get Tulsi over the line and on that stage?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11612346/118419881/1281545749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTk1NTRmOS0xNDAxLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yBDS0pKUEsGcjrnwCOhWe68w5aOSX2SiYbgdrdy7CTI=&refcode=em191106_ask&refcode2=de9554f9-1401-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68) [DONATE $1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11612382/118419917/-1239230698?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTk1NTRmOS0xNDAxLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yBDS0pKUEsGcjrnwCOhWe68w5aOSX2SiYbgdrdy7CTI=&refcode=em191106_button&amount=1&refcode2=de9554f9-1401-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68) Tulsi’s focus since the very beginning has never been on DNC deadlines or 60 second soundbites — she’s kept her feet on the ground and her focus on serving We, The People. But momentum is important in any campaign — especially when we know we can’t rely on a fair shake for Tulsi from the establishment media — and our people powered campaign has been gaining slow but steady momentum every single month, day by day, conversation by conversation. [Tulsi is in this to win, for all of us, and that’s why it is up to all of us to make sure we do everything in our power to make sure our next Commander in Chief is seen and heard by as many Americans as possible. This means purchasing TV and digital ads so she can bypass the corporate media and speak directly to the people. clean_body: | | | | Friend — We wanted you to be the first to hear the news: Today’s Quinnipiac poll out of Iowa means Tulsi will be invited back on the debate stage in Atlanta in just two weeks — continuing to speak truth to power, holding the DNC and corporate media accountable to the people and representing all of us in our fight for a more perfect union. You did this, friend. Polls should never supplant the democratic process embodied in our primary and caucus system, but they can show trends over time and our 100% grassroots momentum is growing stronger every day — especially in the critical early states where Tulsi is on the ground, speaking directly to voters. We just closed on our strongest fundraising month to date, and as of right now we’re only 8,897 donations away from hitting the unique donor threshold required to qualify for the December debate. Tulsi’s focus since the very beginning has never been on DNC deadlines or 60 second soundbites — she’s kept her feet on the ground and her focus on serving We, The People. But momentum is important in any campaign — especially when we know we can’t rely on a fair shake for Tulsi from the establishment media — and our people powered campaign has been gaining slow but steady momentum every single month, day by day, conversation by conversation. Onwards and upwards, TULSI2020 | | PAID FOR BY TULSI NOW PO Box 75255 Kapolei HI 96707 The truth is that email is one of the most important tools we have to update supporters like you. name: Maya Rupert
subject: In 362 days will you have done everything you can to defeat Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80a/3eb3e2fc/561c4832/744d95b9/2481650745/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.julianforthefuture.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20191106_em_org&source=20191106_em_org")

| | We're one year out from Election Day in 2020, when we have the opportunity to defeat Trump. **What will you do in the next 362 days so that we can all say adi os to Trump? ** Last night we saw huge victories for Democrats up and down the ballot, and that would not have been possible without the investment that supporters made to organize, mobilize, and get out the vote. [**Can I count on you to organize?**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80a/3eb3e2fc/561c4832/744d95b8/2481650745/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://juliancastro.com/volunteer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+Can+I+count+on+you+to+organize&utm_campaign=20191106_em_org&source=20191106_em_org") We're out speaking with voters to learn more about what's happening in their communities and discussing Julian's vision for the future. **We need your help no matter where you live! ** [Mobilize with us on our online team](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80a/3eb3e2fc/561c4832/744d95a7/2481650745/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://juliancastro.com/volunteer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+Mobilize+with+us+on+our+online+team&utm_campaign=20191106_em_org&source=20191106_em_org") ➡️ get the tools you need to help us talk to voters online, via text, and on the phone. [Organize a local team ](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80a/3eb3e2fc/561c4832/744d95a6/2481650745/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://juliancastro.com/volunteer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4+-+Organize+a+local+team+&utm_campaign=20191106_em_org&source=20191106_em_org")➡️ get the resources you need to organize a local team including an organizing starter kit, complete with a handbook, campaign literature, buttons, bumper stickers, and signs. [**GET STARTED**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80a/3eb3e2fc/561c4832/744d95a5/2481650745/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://juliancastro.com/volunteer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5+-+GET+STARTED&utm_campaign=20191106_em_org&source=20191106_em_org") With you on our team, we can make the next 362 days count and wake up November 3, 2020 knowing we've given it our all. Maya Rupert Campaign Manager Julian for the Future [P.S. Can't volunteer at the moment? Chip in to help grow our organizing efforts across the country here. ](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80a/3eb3e2fc/561c4832/744d95a4/2481650745/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/castroorganizing?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+PS+Canrsquot+volunteer+at+the+moment+Chi&utm_campaign=20191106_em_org&source=20191106_em_org")

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80a/3eb3e2fc/561c4832/744d95a0/2481650745/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=10+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191106_em_org&source=20191106_em_org")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80a/3eb3e2fc/561c4832/744d95af/2481650745/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=20191106_em_org&source=20191106_em_org"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80a/3eb3e2fc/561c4832/744d95ae/2481650745/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191106_em_org&source=20191106_em_org"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: JUST CONFIRMED: 158 judges and counting ⚖✓
body:
As of this afternoon, President Donald J. Trump has appointed—and gotten confirmed—158 life-tenured federal judges who will defend our... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=91e1caec08&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • November 6, 2019
---
| | |
# **JUST CONFIRMED: 158 judges and counting** ⚖✓

**As of this afternoon,** President Donald J. Trump has appointed—and gotten confirmed—158 life-tenured federal judges who will defend our Constitution, personal freedoms, and the rule of law. A few of the highlights:
* President Trump’s nominees alone fill _one-quarter_ of the seats on our nation’s Circuit Courts of Appeals.

* His nominees fill two of the nine powerful seats on America’s Supreme Court.

* He has seen more Circuit Court judges confirmed by this point in his presidency than any past president _in United States history_.

**“Few legacies will be longer** lasting than this judicial one,” Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) wrote today. “These new judges are principled constitutionalists who have demonstrated excellence and professionalism throughout their legal careers.”

[President Trump: More than 150 federal judges—and counting!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e47ed856a8&e=3ee4985eea)

**Once elected, this President** wasted no time fulfilling his pledge to nominate judges who put impartiality and independence above activism from the bench. On day one, the Trump Administration went to work with the Senate to fill crucial vacancies. Fast forward to now, and the result is nothing less than a historic transformation of the judiciary.

**The American Founding** was built on the idea of separation of powers, President Trump said today. “This system was designed to protect citizens against the unjust concentration of governmental power . . . [but] when judges assume the role of a legislature, the rights of _all_ citizens are threatened.”

**What that means today:** “The impartial and objective judge, who is a faithful servant of the law, is essential to the survival of American liberty.”

**In just three years** , President Trump has nominated and had confirmed two Supreme Court justices, 44 Circuit Court judges, and 112 District Court judges. Today, that historic pace is only accelerating: The President is set to have more judges confirmed this year alone than in all of 2017 and 2018 combined.

**The** **average age** of these new circuit judges is less than 50 years old—a full 10 years younger than the average age of former President Obama’s circuit nominees. That fact is important. President Trump understands that appointing good, fair judges is one of the most important legacies a President can leave. And thanks to the extraordinary number of young, talented judges he’s selected, that legacy is likely to last for decades to come.

**Even more important** than how long judges serve, of course, is what they do once they get on the bench. President Trump has always nominated judges who have a proven track record of standing up for the rule of law _as written,_ not as imagined.

**This quote** from President Trump’s speech today may be the most important: | | _When judges write policy instead of applying the law, they impose sweeping changes on millions of Americans without the benefit of legislative debate, public rulemaking, or the consent of the governed. As a result, these highly political rulings inflict painful damage on our security, society, and economy—imposing unworkable edicts on businesses, workers, families, and law enforcement._ |
---|---|---

**His promise:** “I will do everything in my power to halt judicial activism, and to ensure the law is upheld equally, fairly, and without political prejudice for all of our citizens.”

[Ted Cruz: “Trump has achieved historic impact with THIS action.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b90b714d0d&e=3ee4985eea)

**Watch and share:** [The left imposes with judges what it can’t at the ballot box.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2ed9538774&e=3ee4985eea)
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
| **President Trump, Judge Brett M. Kavanaugh, and Anthony M. Kennedy, retired Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States, in the East Room of the White House** | October 8, 2018
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=14d6d22c1e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e8ce6d1389&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=57de56c4bd)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---
